item.description: The most common early stumbles in patterns, and the cheap corrections that fix them for hobby leatherworkers.

item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about saddle stitch tutorial through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.description: Straight answers to the finishing questions hobby leatherworkers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: "leathercraft starter tools" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "leathercraft starter tools" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how hobby leatherworkers approach stitching — less maximalism, more maintenance.
